visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens with a young man in a grey hoodie leaning forward in an indoor setting with a brick-textured wall and a wooden shelf. He is speaking animatedly with varied facial expressions. To his right, a woman in a red hoodie and white pants sits on a brown leather couch. (2) A transition occurs to a black screen featuring cartoon-style headshots of three men with names in white Traditional Chinese text. (3) The scene returns to the living room where the man and woman continue their conversation. The man gestures wildly and laughs with his mouth wide open. Yellow and white text overlays frequently appear in the center of the frame. (4) The location shifts to a brightly lit medical clinic or office. A man in green surgical scrubs and a patterned cap faces the camera, gesturing with one finger while speaking. Several other people, mostly wearing face masks, are visible in the background. (5) A close-up shot focuses on a pair of hands with dark-colored fingernails holding a small, clear plastic container. Inside the container is a tiny, pale biological specimen. Text overlays identify the object. (6) Back in an office space, the man from the first scene (now in a striped polo shirt) and the doctor are standing and talking. The man touches his lower abdomen while the doctor makes gestures. (7) The final scene takes place in a bright, modern interior room with white walls and a bookshelf. The man in a blue and black polo and the woman in a black hoodie address the camera, laughing and pointing.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: hahababy旗下. [Subtitle]: 小小員工. (2) [Logo]: 小嘎. [Logo]: 小翰. [Logo]: 小漢. (3) [Subtitle]: 我們決定啊. [Subtitle]: 我們要一起去. [Variety]: 團結力量大. [Variety]: 結紮啦. (4) [Variety]: (手術室都是人). [Subtitle]: 我們手術室太小. [Slogan]: 下次找100坪的. (5) [Variety]: (不喜歡看到). [Variety]: 太血腥的蛋蛋. [Subtitle]: 等一下會掏一點東西. [Subtitle]: 出來讓妳看一下. [Subtitle]: 下一個就換妳看. [Variety]: 好酷我也要看. [Variety]: 看你老公不要看我. (6) [Subtitle]: 輸精管輸精管. [Variety]: 這就是剪下來的輸精管. [Variety]: 好短哦!!. (7) [Subtitle]: 他只截斷一短. [Subtitle]: 剩下的還在裡面. (8) [Subtitle]: 手摸一下蛋蛋. [Subtitle]: 有摸到嗎. [Subtitle]: 有摸到. [Subtitle]: 有摸到一個硬硬的地方嗎. [Subtitle]: 有一顆. [Variety]: 你摸不到!?. [Variety]: 整副切掉484. [Subtitle]: 蛋蛋正中間. [Subtitle]: 稍微有一點硬硬的一塊. [Subtitle]: 有啊. [Subtitle]: 有個傷口啊. [Variety]: 宗翰的蛋蛋在哪裡?. (9) [Slogan]: 特此澄清是造謠. [Subtitle]: 傷口不會痛. [Subtitle]: 他好像完全沒有任何的. [Subtitle]: 感覺的樣子. [Subtitle]: 沒有什麼感覺. [Subtitle]: 我洗的時候我都這樣. [Variety]: 溫柔對待. [Subtitle]: 不用啦. [Subtitle]: 我都不敢這樣搓. [Variety]: !!!!!. [Subtitle]: 好以上啊所以沒有問題啦. [Subtitle]: 沒問題啦. [Subtitle]: 而且他到處推薦人家. [Subtitle]: 對啊遇到. [Variety]: 快去結紮啊!!!. [Subtitle]: 那這次主要還是要感謝我們這個. [Slogan]: 泌密會客室. [Subtitle]: 兩位醫師啊. [Slogan]: 厲害的津久帥醫師.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 main female companion, 1 male doctor, 1 male colleague, and 2 female staff members.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male character wears a grey hoodie in the beginning and later shifts to a striped polo and a blue/black polo. The main female character wears a red hoodie and later a black hoodie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The backgrounds include a home-style living room with a brick-patterned wall, a brown couch, and bookshelves. Another major setting is a clean, white-walled medical clinic with surgical equipment and office desks.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male voice speaking Traditional Chinese at a fast pace. An upbeat, rhythmic background music with electronic synthesizer textures and a steady percussion beat plays throughout. (2) A sharp whoosh sound effect marks a visual transition. The male voice continues with high pitch variability and energetic projection, followed by a sudden burst of group laughter with high vocal arousal. (3) A female voice enters the mix, speaking with a friendly and amused tone. Her speech is at a moderate rate, overlapping with the persistent background music which maintains a consistent, moderate BPM. (4) A ding or chime sound effect triggers a new phase, coinciding with a shift in the acoustic environment to a more reverberant indoor space. A new male voice, presumably a doctor, speaks with professional clarity and lower arousal. (5) Faint incidental sounds of movement and handling plastic are heard, along with more group laughter in the background. The background music ducks slightly in volume to prioritize the clear, enunciated dialogue between the speakers. (6) The primary male speaker returns to a very high arousal state, shouting excitedly, which is accentuated by several rapid cartoon-style pop sound effects. The track concludes with the energetic BGM swelling and then fading out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Setup -> Clinic Visit -> Specimen Reveal -> Post-op Experience.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video document's the main character's experience getting a vasectomy, using a comedic and lighthearted tone to share life milestones and endorse a specific medical clinic and its doctors.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The characters explicitly thank the doctors and the clinic, show the clinic's logo, and display slogan-like text recommending the service.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical Taiwanese social-media style vlog with high text density and energetic editing.
